  "society_power": 6.5,
  "state_power": 6.5,
  "society_change": 0.5,
  "state_change": -1.0,
  "key_event": "Paris Commune and adoption of Third Republic Constitution",
  "reasoning": "The Paris Commune and the adoption of the Third Republic Constitution strengthened civil society by demonstrating the power of grassroots movements and increasing political participation, while the fall of the Second Empire and political polarization weakened the state's authority and stability."
